title: NeuronScopeDecision
description: Scope section of the composed Phi direct resolver (F0039, spec §10.3). Decides whether the current message is in the permitted CRM scope, clearly out of scope, suspicious/instruction-manipulating, or ambiguous. It selects NO specialist action (that is the sibling intent decision). JSON Schema controls shape only; deterministic cross-field invariants (§10.4) and fail-closed validation are enforced in code — a violation maps to a safe redirect. `allow` means only 'eligible to continue through bounded CRM routing'; it grants no authorization.

decision.description: allow requires scope=crm + requires_intent_resolution=true + clarification_code=null; redirect requires scope in {non_crm, suspicious} + requires_intent_resolution=false; clarify requires scope=ambiguous + non-null clarification_code.
